content.json:
# AI Security Sandbox — SOC Workbook

Operational visibility for the AI Security Sandbox: policy enforcement, DLP / content safety, prompt-injection defense, agent delegation trust, MCP tool calls, anomaly / cost guardrails, approvals, and run lifecycle — all sourced from `AiAgentAudit_CL`.

> Tip: every panel respects the **Time Range**, **Agent Type**, **Action Type**, and **Run ID** parameters below. Leave a parameter blank (or `*`) to disable that filter.

parameters.name: AgentType
parameters.label: Agent type
parameters.query: AiAgentAudit_CL | extend agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))) | where isnotempty(agent_type_x) | distinct agent_type_x | order by agent_type_x asc

parameters.name: ActionType
parameters.label: Action type
parameters.query: AiAgentAudit_CL | extend action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))) | where isnotempty(action_type_x) | distinct action_type_x | order by action_type_x asc

content.json:
## Operational KPIs

A single-pane overview comparable to the Microsoft Sentinel & Defender XDR landing pages — **activity volume**, **policy enforcement**, **threat detections**, and **operations & cost** — all scoped by the filters above. Each tile drills into evidence rows in the sections below.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where action_type_x in~ ({ActionType}) or '*' in~ ({ActionType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), policy_decision_x
| render timechart
content.title: Policy decisions over time

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where action_type_x in~ ({ActionType}) or '*' in~ ({ActionType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), action_type_x
| render timechart
content.title: Top action types over time

content.json:
## Policy & Capability Enforcement

Posture summary, top denied destinations, approval flow, and excessive-agency blocks.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where action_type_x in~ ({ActionType}) or '*' in~ ({ActionType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| summarize events=count(),
            denies=countif(policy_decision_x == 'deny'),
            blocks=countif(outcome_x == 'blocked'),
            approvals=countif(policy_decision_x == 'requires_approval')
        by action_type_x
| extend block_rate=iif(events>0, todouble(denies+blocks)/events, 0.0)
| order by blocks desc, denies desc, events desc
content.title: Policy posture by action type

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    destination_x=tostring(column_ifexists('destination_s', column_ifexists('destination', ''))),
    path_x=tostring(column_ifexists('path_s', column_ifexists('path', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where policy_decision_x == 'deny' or outcome_x == 'blocked'
| extend target = iif(isnotempty(destination_x), destination_x, path_x)
| where isnotempty(target)
| summarize denies=count(), runs=dcount(run_id_x) by action_type_x, target
| order by denies desc
| take 25
content.title: Top blocked destinations / paths

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', ''))),
    destination_x=tostring(column_ifexists('destination_s', column_ifexists('destination', ''))),
    path_x=tostring(column_ifexists('path_s', column_ifexists('path', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('approval_request', 'approval_response') or policy_decision_x == 'requires_approval'
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, action_type_x, policy_decision_x, outcome_x, destination_x, path_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: High-risk action approval flow

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', ''))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'excessive_agency_block'
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, error_code_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Excessive-agency blocks (LLM08)

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    dlp_patterns_x=tostring(column_ifexists('dlp_patterns_s', column_ifexists('dlp_patterns', ''))),
    classification_label_x=tostring(column_ifexists('classification_label_s', column_ifexists('classification_label', ''))),
    risk_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('risk_score_d', column_ifexists('risk_score', real(null)))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'dlp_scan'
| where policy_decision_x == 'deny' or outcome_x == 'blocked' or dlp_patterns_x != ''
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, dlp_patterns_x, classification_label_x, risk_score_x, error_code_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: DLP interceptions

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    content_safety_category_x=tostring(column_ifexists('content_safety_category_s', column_ifexists('content_safety_category', ''))),
    risk_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('risk_score_d', column_ifexists('risk_score', real(null)))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'content_safety_check'
| where policy_decision_x == 'deny' or outcome_x == 'blocked'
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, content_safety_category_x, risk_score_x, error_code_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Content Safety blocks

content.json:
## Prompt Shield (LLM01 — prompt injection)

Layered defense: deterministic patterns + heuristic scoring + retrieved-content scans on RAG inputs.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    injection_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('injectionScore', column_ifexists('injection_score_d', column_ifexists('injection_score', real(null))))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('prompt_shield_scan', 'retrieved_content_scan')
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, action_type_x, policy_decision_x, outcome_x, injection_score_x, error_code_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Prompt-shield scans (input + retrieved content)

content.json:
## Agent Trust & Delegation

Spawn / delegation events, signed identity envelope failures, and cross-tenant probing.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    parent_agent_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('parentAgentId', column_ifexists('parent_agent_id_s', column_ifexists('parent_agent_id', '')))),
    call_chain_x=tostring(column_ifexists('callChain', column_ifexists('call_chain_s', column_ifexists('call_chain', '')))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', ''))),
    parent_run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('parent_run_id_s', column_ifexists('parent_run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}' or parent_run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('agent_spawn', 'agent_delegation', 'delegation_check')
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, parent_run_id_x, agent_type_x, action_type_x, policy_decision_x, outcome_x, parent_agent_id_x, call_chain_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Agent spawn / delegation

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('signature_verification_failure', 'cross_tenant_access_attempt')
| summarize count(), arg_max(TimeGenerated, correlation_id_x, error_code_x) by action_type_x, run_id_x
| order by count_ desc
content.title: Signature failures & cross-tenant probing

content.json:
## MCP Tooling

Model Context Protocol tool discovery and invocation. Each tool call is namespaced (`mcp://<server>/<agent>/<tool>`).

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    policy_decision_x=tostring(column_ifexists('policy_decision_s', column_ifexists('policy_decision', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    tool_namespace_x=tostring(column_ifexists('toolNamespace', column_ifexists('tool_namespace_s', column_ifexists('tool_namespace', '')))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('mcp_tool_call', 'mcp_tool_discovery')
| summarize calls=count(),
            denies=countif(policy_decision_x == 'deny'),
            blocks=countif(outcome_x == 'blocked')
        by tool_namespace_x, action_type_x, agent_type_x
| order by calls desc
content.title: MCP tool usage

content.json:
## Anomalies, Cost & Loops

ML-style anomaly scores, cost-threshold breaches, runaway loops, and token budget consumption.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    anomaly_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('anomalyScore', column_ifexists('anomaly_score_d', column_ifexists('anomaly_score', real(null))))),
    risk_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('risk_score_d', column_ifexists('risk_score', real(null)))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'anomaly_ml_score'
| where isnotnull(anomaly_score_x)
| project TimeGenerated, run_id_x, agent_type_x, anomaly_score_x, risk_score_x
| order by anomaly_score_x desc, TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Anomaly ML scores (top 50)

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    estimated_cost_usd_x=todouble(column_ifexists('estimatedCostUsd', column_ifexists('estimated_cost_usd_d', column_ifexists('estimated_cost_usd', real(null))))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| summarize
    total_cost_usd=sum(estimated_cost_usd_x),
    cost_breaches=countif(action_type_x == 'cost_threshold_breach')
  by run_id_x, agent_type_x
| where total_cost_usd > 0 or cost_breaches > 0
| order by total_cost_usd desc
content.title: Cost per run (USD) and threshold breaches

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'loop_detected'
| summarize occurrences=count(), arg_max(TimeGenerated, error_code_x) by run_id_x, agent_type_x
| order by occurrences desc
content.title: Loop detection

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    token_count_x=toint(column_ifexists('token_count_d', column_ifexists('token_count', int(0)))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'openai_call'
| summarize total_tokens=sum(token_count_x),
            avg_tokens=avg(token_count_x),
            calls=count()
        by run_id_x, agent_type_x
| order by total_tokens desc
content.title: Token budget consumption per run

content.query:
let _audit = AiAgentAudit_CL
  | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
  | extend
      run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', ''))),
      agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
      token_count_x=toint(column_ifexists('token_count_d', column_ifexists('token_count', int(0)))),
      risk_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('risk_score_d', column_ifexists('risk_score', real(null)))),
      anomaly_score_x=todouble(column_ifexists('anomalyScore', column_ifexists('anomaly_score_d', column_ifexists('anomaly_score', real(null)))));
let per_run = _audit
  | summarize total_events=count(),
              total_tokens=sum(token_count_x),
              max_risk=max(risk_score_x),
              max_anomaly=max(anomaly_score_x)
          by run_id_x, agent_type_x;
let baselines = per_run
  | summarize avg_events=avg(total_events), avg_tokens=avg(total_tokens)
  | extend _join_key=1;
per_run
| extend _join_key=1
| join kind=inner baselines on _join_key
| where total_events > (avg_events * 3.0)
    or total_tokens > (avg_tokens * 3.0)
    or max_risk >= 0.8
    or max_anomaly >= 0.7
| project run_id_x, agent_type_x, total_events, total_tokens, max_risk, max_anomaly, avg_events, avg_tokens
| order by max_anomaly desc, max_risk desc, total_events desc
content.title: Run-level anomaly candidates

content.json:
## Operational Health

Kill-switch toggles, run lifecycle, rate limiting, DSAR exports — the ambient SRE/IR signals.

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    agent_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('agent_type_s', column_ifexists('agent_type', ''))),
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where agent_type_x in~ ({AgentType}) or '*' in~ ({AgentType})
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x in ('run_start', 'run_complete', 'run_abort')
| summarize
    starts=countif(action_type_x == 'run_start'),
    completes=countif(action_type_x == 'run_complete'),
    aborts=countif(action_type_x == 'run_abort'),
    failures=countif(outcome_x == 'failure'),
    timeouts=countif(outcome_x == 'timeout')
  by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), agent_type_x
| render columnchart kind=unstacked
content.title: Run lifecycle (start / complete / abort)

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    path_x=tostring(column_ifexists('path_s', column_ifexists('path', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', '')))
| where action_type_x in ('admin_kill_switch_toggle', 'kill_switch_check')
| where action_type_x == 'admin_kill_switch_toggle' or outcome_x == 'blocked'
| project TimeGenerated, action_type_x, outcome_x, flag=path_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Kill-switch toggles & blocks

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    run_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('run_id_s', column_ifexists('run_id', '')))
| where '{RunId}' == '' or run_id_x has '{RunId}'
| where action_type_x == 'rate_limit_exceeded'
| summarize hits=count(), arg_max(TimeGenerated, error_code_x) by run_id_x
| order by hits desc
content.title: Rate-limit hits

content.query:
AiAgentAudit_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend
    action_type_x=tostring(column_ifexists('action_type_s', column_ifexists('action_type', ''))),
    outcome_x=tostring(column_ifexists('outcome_s', column_ifexists('outcome', ''))),
    error_code_x=tostring(column_ifexists('error_code_s', column_ifexists('error_code', ''))),
    correlation_id_x=tostring(column_ifexists('correlation_id_s', column_ifexists('correlation_id', '')))
| where action_type_x in ('admin_dsar_export', 'dsar_purge', 'admin_run_delete')
| project TimeGenerated, action_type_x, outcome_x, error_code_x, correlation_id_x
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Compliance / admin actions (DSAR, purge, delete)
